creator: gustavo.romero@protonmail.com
text:
Hi,

Curtis, I believe Greg e Mikael are talking only about OpenJDK code in FreeBSD port github (downstream) whilst I'm talking about the OpenJDK Mercurial repo in openjdk.java.net in fact (upstream) and trying to understand if you are planning to contribute the patcheset to that upstream OpenJDK repo (bsd port in Hg openjdk.java.net).

It looks like that the OpenJDK PPC64 BSD port effort/discussions upstream got stuck as per bsd port ML [0] (looks only a bunch of advertisement for last non-related pushes to jdk8u) and from what I remember from the last discussions more than a year ago on ppc-aix-port ML [1]. Hence I'm wondering what's your current understanding about it/plans, Curtis :)

Thank you.

[0] https://mail.openjdk.java.net/pipermail/bsd-port-dev/
[1] https://mail.openjdk.java.net/pipermail/ppc-aix-port-dev/2016-December/002847.html
